utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present with specific dates), transportation (has details and a single total cost, acceptable), accommodation (details and cost, acceptable), activities (listed with names and costs), additional_services (present as empty list), and total_budget (a single number total, but not a detailed breakdown). The format asks for 'complete cost breakdown' under total_budget; the package only provides a single total figure without a breakdown, so this is not fully specified. All other items are fully specified.

Activities include 'Full-day Scuba Diving Excursion' which corresponds to 'Scuba Diving Excursion' in activities, and 'Half-day Rock Climbing session' which corresponds to 'Rock Climbing' in activities.
